Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What is the current realization going on in your life?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-07-29 · 6 answers
...if i am allowed to ask.
user [78] · 2007-07-30
Everything and really EVERYTHING happens according to the will of Krishna.
Thats why everything has its purpose....
user [2] · 2007-07-29
Time is short and I cannot fool around in the hope to achieve automatic "salvation" from being a devotee.
user [39] · 2007-07-29
Thank you, Prabhu, this topic is like a breath of fresh air among all the controversial ones. My material attachments are stronger than I thought they were, and it means I am not serious enough in my practice of devotional service. Begging all the Vaishnavas for mercy, mercy, mercy...
user [12] · 2007-07-29
I have to be happy in order to practice Krishna Consciousness
user [19] · 2007-07-30
Mine is that people I meet (family, nondevotees) encourage me for pravritti and I just want nivritti.
user [38] · 2007-07-30
Ditto. Realizing this one becomes peaceful. Can be tested only in adversity though.
